title: Lemmings 2: The Tribes
short_description: The sequel to Lemmings, featuring 12 tribes and 60 new skills.
description: Lemmings 2: The Tribes is a puzzle game developed by DMA Design (later known as Rockstar North) and published by Psygnosis. Released in 1993, it expanded on the original Lemmings with 12 unique tribes, each with their own set of skills, and a vastly expanded array of 60 skills across the game. Despite critical praise the development team felt the larger, more detailed lemmings somewhat diminished the charm of the original.
